diagnostics.hg_modes_abs.png: Absolute-value Hermite-Gaussian sanity plot used to inspect modal building blocks.

comparisons.heatmap_et_complex_nrmse.png: 2D grid of complex `E_T` NRMSE over line count and z-slice count, split by gap count.
comparisons.heatmap_median_relative_abs_et_error.png: 2D grid of median relative `|E_T|` error over the same configuration axes.
comparisons.et_complex_nrmse_vs_gap_count.png: How complex `E_T` error changes as more leading gaps are included.
comparisons.median_relative_abs_et_error_vs_gap_coun: How median relative `|E_T|` error changes with gap count.
comparisons.fit_success_cost_summary.png: Fit success fraction and fit-cost overview across configurations.
comparisons.error_vs_reduced_dataset_size.png: Scatter view linking reduced dataset size to complex `E_T` error.

config_common.point_selection.png: Selected measurement points overlaid on the underlying `|S11|` slice and default line geometry.
config_common.fitted_efield_comparison.png: Reduced fitted field versus full-grid field on the selected z-slice and frequency.
config_common.fitted_efield_residual.png: Residual between the fitted reduced field and the full-grid reference field.
config_common.sqrt_dgamma_correction.png: Before/after correction view for reduced `sqrt(Δγ)` against the full-grid phase and sign.
config_common.beam_model_components.png: Hermite-Gaussian beam-model decomposition for the chosen fit parameters.
config_common.et_complex_plane.png: Complex-plane comparison of full and reduced `E_T` values.
config_common.abs_et_over_z.png: Magnitude of `E_T` as a function of z-position.
config_common.abs_et_over_frequency.png: Magnitude of `E_T` across frequency for every retained z-position.

config_line_scaled.description: Per-line `sqrt(Δγ)` baseline subtraction and line-ordering plot. One file is present for each selected line.

legacy_groups.label: ET_results.npz
legacy_groups.description: Legacy ET result bundle from earlier analysis iterations.

legacy_groups.label: beam_fit_results*.pkl
legacy_groups.description: Legacy beam-fit cache variants kept outside the newer variation-study folder.

adaptive_bead_pull_variations.fits: One cache per `(line_count, gap)` pair. Each pickle stores fitted parameters, costs, success flags, frequencies, and reduced-point counts.
adaptive_bead_pull_variations.full_reference: One `.npz` per discovered gap containing the full-grid `E_T` reference for that gap.
adaptive_bead_pull_variations.results: One `.npz` per configuration, storing reduced and full `E_T` arrays together with the configuration selectors.
adaptive_bead_pull_variations.metrics.csv: Tabular summary across all configurations, including fit quality and `E_T` error metrics.
adaptive_bead_pull_variations.slurm: Array-job inputs, submission script, and captured `.out` / `.err` logs for the fit-cache stage.
